name: Is workers' comp different for respiratory claims in Utah vs Idaho?
description: Utah better for latent diseases; both comp primary but details vary.

mainEntity.name: Is workers' comp different for respiratory claims in Utah vs Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah better for latent diseases; both comp primary but details vary.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, Utah has 8-year latency rule for dust diseases; Idaho emphasizes medical panels.** Both no-fault but Utah caps non-economic, Idaho allows suits easier[4]. Key factors: Filing deadlines (Utah 180 days notice); attorney involvement higher in ID. Cross-state work complicates. Check domicile rules. Local lawyer knows nuances.
